items.accessibility_caption: Photo by Ahiba Jalal Khawajah on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of magazine, poster and text that says 'If you're stepping out, please carry an water bottle with you. YOU never know who might be desperately in need. small act of kindness can mean everything & you might save α life. JazakAllah. M 10 found dead as Karachi endures 'hottest day in years' @mangobaaz'.

items.accessibility_caption: Photo by Ahiba Jalal Khawajah on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of magazine, poster and text that says 'If you're stepping out, please carry an water bottle with you. YOU never know who might be desperately in need. small act of kindness can mean everything & you might save α life. JazakAllah. M 10 found dead as Karachi endures 'hottest day in years' @mangobaaz'.
